languages.text: Последние события принесли Вольному Торговцу немало жесточайших испытаний. Предстоит выяснить, не сказались ли они на здоровье представителя древней династии.

traits.locale_text: Последние часы принесли Вольному Торговцу немало жесточайших испытаний. Предстоит выяснить, не сказались ли они на здоровье последнего представителя древней династии.

languages.text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.
languages.original_text: Последние события принесли Вольному Торговцу немало жесточайших испытаний. Предстоит выяснить, не сказались ли они на здоровье представителя древней династии.

traits.locale_text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of trials. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.
Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of trials. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.
Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.
Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.

languages.text: Die jüngsten Ereignisse waren für {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} ein wahres Martyrium. Es gilt zu ermitteln, ob ihnen {mf|der Erbe|die Erbin} einer uralten Dynastie Tribut zollen muss.
languages.original_text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Die jüngsten Ereignisse waren für {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} ein wahres Martyrium. Es gilt zu ermitteln, ob ihnen {mf|der Erbe|die Erbin} einer uralten Dynastie Tribut zollen muss.

languages.text: Les récentes calamités ont mis le corps {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} à rude épreuve. Il est important de déterminer si tout ceci a eu des conséquences sur la santé de {mf|l'héritier|l'héritière} d'une antique dynastie.
languages.original_text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Les récentes calamités ont mis le corps {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} à rude épreuve. Il est important de déterminer si tout ceci a eu des conséquences sur la santé de {mf|l'héritier|l'héritière} d'une antique dynastie.

languages.text: 最近的灾祸让行商浪人经历了极为严酷的考验，必须确认这些考验是否对这位古老王朝的继承人造成了影响。
languages.original_text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 最近的灾祸让行商浪人经历了极为严酷的考验，必须确认这些考验是否对这位古老王朝的继承人造成了影响。

languages.text: Una serie de calamidades han sometido a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente a toda clase de penurias. Es necesario determinar el efecto que han podido tener sobre {mf|el heredero|la heredera} de la ancestral dinastía.
languages.original_text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Una serie de calamidades han sometido a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente a toda clase de penurias. Es necesario determinar el efecto que han podido tener sobre {mf|el heredero|la heredera} de la ancestral dinastía.

languages.text: 最近の災難は、ローグ・トレーダーに最も過酷な試練を与えている。古代王朝の末裔にその犠牲が及んだかどうかを見極めなければならない。
languages.original_text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.

languages.text: Son zamanlardaki felaketler, Hür Tacir'i en acımasız sınavlara tabi tuttu. Bunların, kadim bir hanedanlığın vârisi üzerinde yıkıcı bir etki yaratıp yaratmadığı belirlenmeli.
languages.original_text: Recent calamities have subjected the Rogue Trader to the most vicious of ordeals. It must be determined whether they have taken their toll on the scion of an ancient dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Son zamanlardaki felaketler, Hür Tacir'i en acımasız sınavlara tabi tuttu. Bunların, kadim bir hanedanlığın vârisi üzerinde yıkıcı bir etki yaratıp yaratmadığı belirlenmeli.
